response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and event-driven systems, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in full-stack development with diverse technologies
Proven ability to scale and maintain complex systems
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI architecture
No clear experience in fintech infrastructure
Not evident experience in leading large engineering teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
